data.title: Data Encryption Standards
data.description: All communications are encrypted using advanced encryption standards to protect against eavesdropping.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular assessments and updates are performed to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Continuous vulnerability scanning and patching practices.

data.title: Authentication Protocols
data.description: Strong authentication mechanisms to ensure user account protection.
data.technical_spec: Two-factor authentication offered to add an extra layer of security.

data.title: Anti-Spam Measures
data.description: Sophisticated algorithms and user reporting features help to detect and block spam messages.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models detect abnormal patterns and behaviors.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Prepared protocols and teams in place to quickly respond to security incidents.
data.technical_spec: Includes monitoring, detection systems, and a dedicated response team.
